title: Workflows: Refer to person assigned in People column in updates/notifications
excerpt:
It is currently not possible to refer to a person assigned in a People column, when creating automatic Updates or Notifications with Workflows. 
I can either refer to the user triggering the change or the item’s Creator …

posts.author: kasperhusted (Kasper Husted)
posts.cookedHtml:
It is currently not possible to refer to a person assigned in a People column, when creating automatic Updates or Notifications with Workflows.

I can either refer to the user triggering the change or the item’s Creator ID (see below), but somehow I cannot refer to the People column itself. I.e., it is not possible to chose e.g. the ‘Owner’ or ‘Person’ assigned to an item.

image503×669 23.3 KB

image472×397 16 KB

An example of an use case: I would like to automatically notify Person A, whenever a project lead assigns Person B to an item in my board.

Right now, I can trigger the notification when I want, but because I can’t refer to Person B in my notification, I can’t actually explain what has happened.

Please note: This is possible to do with automations, but not workflows.

posts.author: IanC (Ian)
posts.cookedHtml:
I am struggling with the same problem. As result I have had to keep using multiple automations to personalize the notification messages with data from the board and cannot use the workflow builder for this process. Here is the support transcript.

  • Diego here. Thank you for reaching out to monday.com [http://monday.com/] support.
    (1:49:43 PM) Diego Rodas: I’m currently reviewing your request and will get back to you shortly. Feel free to share any additional information while I’m going through your messages.
    (1:50:02 PM) Ian Curry: Hi Diego, I am standing by
    (1:52:58 PM) Diego Rodas: I hope you are doing well today, Ian. In this case, I’d just like to confirm that you’d like it when an action that triggers a workflow that this notifies the user that is assigned to that specific task, right?
    (1:56:43 PM) Ian Curry: Basically yes. I have a people column in the board called 1st Approver. When the item is created, the person listed as the 1st Approver must be notified that there is an item for them to approve. This notification message needs to be personalised, so I want to be able to use the name in the 1st Approver column in the opening of the notification message. e.g. Hi (1st Approver).
    (1:57:31 PM) Ian Curry: I have used the Get Item Data action in the workflow builder but I am unable to access the people column data.
    (1:58:07 PM) Ian Curry: to create the personalised message when using the notify action.
    (1:59:47 PM) Diego Rodas: I’ve got you! Just a couple of questions to start. When an item is created, does it already have the first approver assigned? And to confirm, do you prefer using the workflow builder, or would automations work too?
    (2:02:31 PM) Ian Curry: Yes, when the item is created, the originator of the item assigns the 1st Approver in the 1st Approver column. I have been able to do this using automations, but I would prefer to use the use the workflow builder as it offers greater logic control.
    (2:03:18 PM) Diego Rodas: I got you, Ian. Let me run some tests for you about this right now.
    (2:03:26 PM) Ian Curry: Thanks
    (2:03:45 PM) Ian Curry: Is there any way I can share my screen with you?
    (2:07:14 PM) Diego Rodas: In this case, I’d like to do a video for you to see if this helps you at first, bear with me for a moment.
    (2:07:23 PM) Ian Curry: OK
    (2:14:32 PM) Diego Rodas: Thank you for waiting, Ian, here it is: https://share.birdie.so/o/Yv0TqXre

    (2:19:00 PM) Ian Curry: Hi Diego, you are having the same problem that I am having. So how do we request Monday.com to make the people data to be shown in the workflow builder so that it is possible to personalise notifications in the workflow builder as one can do with automations?
    (2:25:22 PM) Diego Rodas: In this case, I will submit this as a feature request, and you can request it here(https://community.monday.com/c/feature-requests/7/none). | [https://community.monday.com/c/feature-requests/7/none]To be honest, I will not be able to provide you with an ETA, but I agree that we should have this function available.

posts.author: UFAI (Adam)
posts.cookedHtml:
They have implemented this!!!

image431×552 13.3 KB

posts.author: kasperhusted (Kasper Husted)
posts.cookedHtml: Awesome! So many great improvements in the Workflow builder lately, love to see it
